scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend ci && npm --prefix frontend ci
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.qa: npm --prefix backend run check:commercial-ready && npm --prefix frontend run qa
scripts.compose:e2e: docker compose up -d postgres backend && bash ./scripts/wait-for-http.sh http://127.0.0.1:3001/health 90 2 && npm --prefix backend run test:e2e
scripts.qa:release: npm run qa && npm run compose:e2e && npm run package:clean
